data.title: Migrate record-test-status.sh to shared library
data.description:
Replace inline MERGE_HEAD detection (~lines 236-263) and REBASE_HEAD detection (~lines 264-296).

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption #1 — substitutive refactor.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] No inline merge detection in executable lines
  Verify: grep -v '^\s*#' plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh | grep -qE '_merge_head_sha=|_merge_base=\$\(git|_rebase_onto=' && exit 1 || true
- [ ] Script sources merge-state.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'source.*merge-state.sh' plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] Existing record-test-status tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-part4.sh
